notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateZprPolicy, GetZprPolicy, ListZprPolicies, UpdateZprPolicy, DeleteZprPolicy, GetZprPolicyWorkRequest, and ListZprPolicyWorkRequests are present in v65.110.0. Create returns a ZprPolicy body plus opc-work-request-id, while update and delete return work-request headers only.

Pinned provider coverage is unconfirmed. formal/sources.lock still points at github.com/oracle/terraform-provider-oci@eb653febb1bab4cc6650a96d404a8baf36fdf671, but the accessible provider inventory did not expose a matching ZprPolicy resource or data source. The providerResource and datasource names therefore stay provisional OCI-style placeholders so generator-owned registry artifacts can derive stable links without claiming verified provider coverage.

Repo-authored runtime semantics stay explicit: bind-versus-create uses explicit OCID first and otherwise only a unique ListZprPolicies match on compartmentId plus exact name, mutable drift is limited to description/statements/tag updates, and the controller uses the ZPR service-local work-request APIs through generatedruntime rather than assuming a standalone workrequests API or unverified provider helper contract.
